proposals.rule: hooks that name the recipient or their obsession outperform generic openers — prefer them

report_md:
## This period

3 approvals, 1 rejection, 4 metric snapshots.

**Proposing:** name-the-recipient hooks. The three top-quartile posts this period all named the person or their hobby in the first line; the rejected one opened generically. Clears the 3-event bar.

**Not proposing:** a shift toward carousels — only 2 supporting data points, below the 3-event threshold. Holding until more evidence lands.
